<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<h1>Source code for booktx.submissions</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Submission payload parsing for the translate-accept commands.</span>

<span class="sd">Owns the three submission wire formats (JSON, TSV, block) and the input-source</span>
<span class="sd">selection that the ``translate insert`` command used to inline. Parsers return</span>
<span class="sd">:class:`booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord` lists directly so the acceptance</span>
<span class="sd">service never sees raw dicts.</span>

<span class="sd">Validation errors are raised as :class:`booktx.config.BooktxError`; the CLI</span>
<span class="sd">renders them via the shared ``_handle_booktx_error`` path, so messages stay</span>
<span class="sd">identical to the previous inline ``_die`` calls.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">json</span>
<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>
<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">sys</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.acceptance</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">_err</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.record_refs</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.text_normalization</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">normalize_submitted_target</span>

<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">pass</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ParsedSubmission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;parse_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;parse_tsv_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;parse_block_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;read_submission_file&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;resolve_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>


<span class="n">_BLOCK_HEADER_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;^&gt;&gt;&gt;\s+(?P&lt;id&gt;\S+)\s*$&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="ParsedSubmission">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.submissions.ParsedSubmission">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A parsed submission payload: optional task id + validated records.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="vm">__slots__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;task_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;records&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation_version&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profile&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="ParsedSubmission.__init__">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.submissions.ParsedSubmission.__init__">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">records</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">task_id</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translation_version</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile</span></div>
</div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_trim_blank_edge_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">])</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="parse_json_submission">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.submissions.parse_json_submission">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">parse_json_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse a JSON ``{&quot;task_id&quot;: ..., &quot;records&quot;: [{&quot;id&quot;,&quot;target&quot;}, ...]}`` payload.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">JSONDecodeError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid JSON submission: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">msg</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> (line </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lineno</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> col </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">colno</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">)&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;JSON submission must be an object&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">schema_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;schema_version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">schema_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">schema_version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;JSON submission field &#39;schema_version&#39; must be an integer&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">legacy_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">legacy_version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;JSON submission field &#39;version&#39; must be an integer&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">translation_version_raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation_version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile_raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;profile&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translation_version_raw</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translation_version_raw</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;JSON submission field &#39;translation_version&#39; must be a string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translation_version_raw</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">profile_raw</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_raw</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;JSON submission field &#39;profile&#39; must be a string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;records&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;JSON submission must contain a &#39;records&#39; array&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;each submitted record must be an object&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">record</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid submitted record: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;each submitted record must contain string fields &#39;id&#39; and &#39;target&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">(),</span>
                <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">normalize_submitted_target</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">task_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;task_id&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task_id</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="parse_tsv_submission">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.submissions.parse_tsv_submission">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">parse_tsv_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse ``&lt;record-id&gt;\\t&lt;target&gt;`` lines (blank lines ignored).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line_no</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">raw_line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">splitlines</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\t</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;malformed_tsv&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;malformed TSV line </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line_no</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: expected &#39;&lt;record-id&gt;&lt;TAB&gt;&lt;target&gt;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\t</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;malformed_tsv&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;malformed TSV line </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line_no</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: missing record id&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">(),</span>
                <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">normalize_submitted_target</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="parse_block_submission">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.submissions.parse_block_submission">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">parse_block_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse the durable ``&gt;&gt;&gt; &lt;record-id&gt;`` block format.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">current_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">current_lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">flush</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">nonlocal</span> <span class="n">current_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_lines</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span>
        <span class="c1"># Strip trailing separator lines (blank or comment) that sit between</span>
        <span class="c1"># this record and the next header (or EOF). Internal and leading</span>
        <span class="c1"># comment lines are preserved as target text.</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_lines</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span><span class="p">)):</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pop</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">target</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">normalize_submitted_target</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_trim_blank_edge_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;empty_block_target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;empty target for record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">current_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">current_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">current_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">current_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line_no</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">raw_line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">splitlines</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">header</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_BLOCK_HEADER_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_line</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">header</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">flush</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">header</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;duplicate_block_record&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;duplicate record id in block submission: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record_id</span>
            <span class="n">current_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">stripped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stripped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stripped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;:&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">content</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="n">value</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation_version&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;none&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
                        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;malformed_block&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">None</span>
                    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profile&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;none&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">profile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stripped</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;malformed_block&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;malformed block submission line </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line_no</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: &quot;</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;expected &#39;&gt;&gt;&gt; &lt;record-id&gt;&#39; before target text&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">current_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_line</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">flush</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;empty_block_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;block submission did not contain any records&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="read_submission_file">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.submissions.read_submission_file">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">read_submission_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Read a submission file, raising BooktxError (never a traceback) on failure.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``ingest_hint`` is a project-relative path to the canonical profile-local</span>
<span class="sd">    ingest file (e.g. ``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/ingest/&lt;task&gt;.block.txt``). When</span>
<span class="sd">    the requested file is missing and differs from the hint, the error message</span>
<span class="sd">    points the agent at the generated ingest location instead of ``/tmp`` or</span>
<span class="sd">    other temporary paths.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">FileNotFoundError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;submission file not found: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">message</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">hint: submit the generated profile-local ingest file &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> (created by `booktx translate next`)&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;submission_file_not_found&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">OSError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;submission_file_unreadable&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;could not read submission file </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="resolve_submission">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.submissions.resolve_submission">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_submission</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">input_format</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">stdin</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">json_file</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">input_file</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Select the input source and parse it into a :class:`ParsedSubmission`.</span>

<span class="sd">    Mirrors the previous inline dispatch in ``translate_insert``: a single</span>
<span class="sd">    ``--record-id``/``--target`` pair wins, then ``--json-file``, then</span>
<span class="sd">    ``--file`` (with ``--format``), then ``--stdin``. Raises BooktxError for</span>
<span class="sd">    any ambiguous or missing combination.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">target</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">target</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;incomplete_record_pair&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;--record-id and --target must be supplied together&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ParsedSubmission</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">normalize_submitted_target</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">))]</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">json_file</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_json_submission</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">read_submission_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">json_file</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">input_file</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">read_submission_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">input_file</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ingest_hint</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">input_format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_json_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">input_format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;tsv&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_tsv_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_block_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stdin</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sys</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stdin</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">input_format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_json_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">input_format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;tsv&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_tsv_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_block_submission</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;no_submission_input&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;provide one of --record-id/--target, --json-file, --file, or --stdin&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="c1"># Re-exported so static type checkers see BooktxError as part of this module&#39;s</span>
<span class="c1"># public surface (it is raised by every parser).</span>
<span class="n">__all__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;BooktxError&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
